results.name: mask of yawgmoth
results.description: A symbol associated with Yawgmoth. Used as the Apocalypse expansion symbol.

results.name: mass land denial
results.description: Effects that regularly destroy, exile, and bounce other lands, keep lands tapped, or change what mana is produced by four or more lands per player without replacing them.

results.name: mass reanimation
results.description: Reanimate everything (or every thing of a kind) from one or more graveyards (or potentially do this).

results.name: mass shrink
results.description: Shrink your opponent's whole board (or part of it).

results.name: master emerald
results.description: A powerful jewel with the ability to control the Chaos Emeralds.

results.name: mastix
results.description: Erebos's whip.

results.name: may parker
results.description: Peter Parker's aunt.

results.name: maze-runner
results.description: Those chosen to run the maze in the story of Dragon's Maze.

results.name: meat
results.description: A good source of protein, if you're not a vegetarian.

results.name: mecha
results.description: Giant robots, possibly piloted, usually with a bipedal humanoid shape.

results.name: mechanical eyestalk
results.description: Spying contraptions. Very popular on Bablovia. See also [eyestalk](/tags/artwork/eyestalk) for the organic variety.

results.name: mechanical foreshadow
results.description: Cards that refer to another card, card type, or named mechanic that was not yet in the game (or sometimes later in Standard's rotation) until a later product's release.

results.name: medallion
results.description: A large ornament of jewellery worn around the shoulders and in front of the chest, usually conveying status.

results.name: megalith
results.description: A large prehistoric stone monument, or a stone which forms part of one.

results.name: melded
results.description: Melded permanents made by the combined back faces of two meld cards.

results.name: meletis
results.description: A polis on Theros.

results.name: melon lord
results.description: Training dummy used by Aang to prepare for the battle against the real Ozai in the episode "Nightmares and Daydreams"

results.name: melwythorne
results.description: Dryad student from Arcavios, named and detailed in the D&D Strixhaven book

results.name: membranous wing
results.description: The kind of wings you'll typically see on bats and dragons.

results.name: meme
results.description: Memes as they show up in cards, and cards and card artworks that have been repeatedly used in Magic jokes over the years. Please tag only the original art the meme was used with.

results.name: meme
results.description: Cards that have become memes in Magic, or are explicitly based off of memes.
